title: nicotiana fragrans var. fatuhivensis
intro: Nicotiana fragrans var. fatuhivensis, also known as Fatu Hiva nicotiana, is a rare and fragrant flowering plant native to the island of Fatu Hiva in French Polynesia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Nicotiana fragrans var. fatuhivensis include reducing inflammation and promoting respiratory health, as well as providing antioxidant and anti-aging properties. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as an herbal tea or infused oil, which can be used to support respiratory health and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu.
